framework.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) for Capability Restriction
framework.description: An agent harness approach that provides controlled access to specific tools (terminal, browser, domain-specific search) through a standardized server interface. Acts as a capability boundary layer between the agent and available actions, though authorization/permission mechanisms aren't detailed.
framework.raw_quote: we used a goose-based harness for all evaluation runs, and provided models with a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that grants access to a terminal, browser, and Stripe-specific search tools.
